productName: BFF Flavored Live Resin Vape Cart - SMH - Strawberry Mango Haze - 1g - (S) - DOH
description: A convenient sativa cartridge carrying Strawberry Mango Haze's character into flavorful, on-demand vapor — discreet, simple, and ready to go. Convenient and clean, with notes of mango, strawberry, and tropical, delivering an active, daytime spark.
